description: You are a marketing analyst at a digital music store using the Chinook database in LibreOffice Base. Build a customer segmentation system within chinook.odb. Create a saved SQL query named 'CustomerLifetimeValue' that joins the Customer and Invoice tables, groups by customer, and computes CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Country, OrderCount, TotalSpent, and AvgOrderValue. Create a table named 'CustomerTier' with columns TierId (integer, primary key), TierName (text), MinSpend (numeric), MaxSpend (numeric), and Description (text). Insert at least four rows into 'CustomerTier' representing distinct customer value segments (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum) using realistic spend thresholds. Create a saved SQL query named 'CustomerTierAssignment' that assigns each customer to a tier based on their total spending by referencing the tier boundaries. Create a report named 'Customer Analysis' that presents the customer segmentation.
